description: First-response template index for evidence collection

har.name: HAR File
har.description: HTTP Archive file from browser DevTools
har.instructions: DevTools → Network → Preserve log → Refresh → Reproduce → Save as HAR

console_errors.name: Browser Console Errors
console_errors.instructions: DevTools → Console → Filter Errors → Save or copy

screenshot.name: Screenshot
screenshot.instructions: Capture before state, broken state, and any visible errors

server_version.name: Server Version
server_version.description: Full version string from About page

integration_config.name: Integration Configuration
integration_config.instructions: Export config, redact API keys and passwords

test_output.name: Test Command Output
test_output.instructions: Run command in War Room, copy full output

work_plan_screenshot.name: Work Plan Screenshot
work_plan_screenshot.instructions: Incident → Work Plan → Expand failing task → Screenshot

task_error.name: Task Error Details
task_error.description: Full error message from failed task
task_error.instructions: Click task → View error → Copy with stack trace

resource_metrics.name: Resource Metrics
resource_metrics.instructions: docker stats, kubectl top, or monitoring dashboard

content_versions.name: Content Versions
content_versions.instructions: Current installed version vs target version

user_role.name: User Role Config
user_role.description: Role and permissions for affected user
user_role.instructions: Settings → Users → User roles and permissions

browser_info.name: Browser Information
browser_info.instructions: Browser type, version, and list of extensions

network_diagram.name: Network Diagram
network_diagram.description: Network path from XSOAR to target

proxy_config.name: Proxy Configuration
proxy_config.instructions: Proxy type, address, port, auth settings

certificate_chain.name: Certificate Chain
certificate_chain.instructions: Full certificate chain for self-signed or internal CA
